title: Photograph of the Hehir-Ade Family
creator: Thuss, Koellein, & Geirs
description: A photograph of Lawrence Hehir and wife, Rosa Ade Hehir, pictured with her sisters: Emma Ade, Annie Ade Reid, and Dora Pauline Ade Stewart Simmons. A dog is visible in the bottom left corner of the photograph. **This is a doctored photo for educational purposes. Metadata is not accurate!**
subject: women, pets and animals, children, girls, men

title: German soldiers playing cards
creator: Ludwig Winkel
description: A photograph of three men in military uniform seated around a table. The men are playing a card game and looking at the camera. There are beer steins on the table.
subject: men, soldiers

title: Portrait of Susan Braswell Anderson

subject: women

title: Photograph of Anna Louise Teachout as an infant
creator: Calbert Bros. & Taylor
description: A photograph of a baby girl propped up in a sitting position. She wears a light colored gown and sits on an animal print blanket. Embossing on the print indicates this photograph was made by Calbert Bros. & Taylor, at the corner of Cherry and Union Streets in Nashville, Tennessee.
subject: infants, girls
